summary: Backend API testing completed for Admin Packages & KYC Management endpoints (iteration 2). All 70 tests passing (29 new + 41 existing from iteration 1).
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 new admin endpoints implemented correctly with proper auth checks (401 for unauthenticated, 403 for non-admin)
Package toggle correctly hides inactive packages from user endpoint while keeping them visible in admin endpoint
KYC decision creates notifications for users as expected
All existing flows (auth, packages, withdrawals, notifications) continue to work
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix mobile numbers during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. New admin endpoints tested: GET /api/admin/packages (returns all packages including inactive), POST /api/admin/packages/toggle (activate/deactivate), DELETE /api/admin/packages/{id}, GET /api/admin/kyc (with status=pending filter), POST /api/admin/kyc/decision (approved/rejected). Admin credentials: mobile=9999999999, password=Admin@123, PIN=1234.
